original_snippet_context: A discussion of the impact of exchange rate fixation in Argentina.
relevant_quote: sc vera que a fixação do cambio, serviu, como o declara o sr. A. F. Kinior, s6 aos interesses dos ricos cm . nada melhorou a sorte da maioria da população ar gentina
justification: While not directly mentioning the Caixa de Conversão, the text criticizes exchange rate fixation as benefiting only the rich, which aligns with orthodox concerns about the potential negative impacts on the broader population and the focus on maintaining a 'strong' currency.
